Dean: Okay let's get right into it. I want to change the way you look at marketing and sales for
the rest of your life. And this entire section, marketing, and sales will kind of be
separated because they are different. One is getting someone pre-qualified, pre-
disposed, and ready to hear the opportunity. Sales are converting the prospect, the
person that might be interested in your mastermind, that kinda wants your capabilities.
They're there, they're ready, the sales part gets them to say "Oh yes, here's my credit
card. I would like this."
So marketing and sales we know are different. Marketing, the best definition you've
probably heard me say it before in the course somewhere, is attracting those you want
and repelling those you don't. You want people that wanna learn your superpowers, not
someone else's. You don't want the wrong people in the room, there's plenty of right
people. That's what the marketing will be.
Sales will be getting them to say yes without feeling like a cheesy sales person, or feeling
pushy or feeling uncomfortable. And we're gonna do that, we're gonna solve that today.
Not many people on this planet know how to do it. We do. And then of course you're
gonna impact their lives.
But let's just start and get right into it. Sales and marketing are the oxygen for every
successful company in the world. We have this illusion, or delusion that if we build it
they will come. How many people do you know that spent years to write a book, or
obsess on building the restaurant, or build an online course. Or a million other things
they put their heart, they're soul. It's not lack of work, the passion is there, the energy is
there, the effort is there. And they build it and they hope people will come, and they
don't.
Great example is a book, Barnes & Noble, I said this in the introduction. Barnes & Noble,
95% of the books you see on all those shelves have sold less than 500 copies. That is

went into writing those books? They just thought if they build them, people will like it so
much they'll write the book, people will tell their friends, and woo, millions of books.
Listen what happens, the news, online, we see the outliers. We see the one out of a
million things that are created go viral. And we don't even know the story behind that.
We're like, oh I wanna invent that next thing. I wanna build this amazing mastermind. I
wanna write this book and people are gonna love it so much, they're just gonna buy it
and share it, and that never happens.
That won't happen. If you build it, no matter how good it is, they will not come unless
you have effective and efficient marketing and sales. People come to me, I'm talking
